title: ligularia sibirica subsp. abakanica
intro: Ligularia sibirica subsp. abakanica, also known as Abakan ligularia, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Siberia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Abakan ligularia include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. Abakan ligularia is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its root is also used in traditional medicine to make herbal preparations.
